title: RealHostilesAI
description: Realistic hostile mob behavior for Minecraft: natural reactions, no unfair attacks, and no mob swarming.
body:
RealHostilesAI makes hostile mobs behave realistically without breaking vanilla gameplay.

✔ Mobs do not attack first  
✔ Rare “special events”  
✔ No mob swarming  
✔ Individual player karma  
✔ Crouch to ask for forgiveness  
✔ Normal daytime burning  
✔ Fully lightweight and server-safe

This plugin gives hostile mobs believable behavior:
- They watch you and approach cautiously.
- They only attack if you attack first.
- One player’s actions do not affect others.
- Mobs learn to trust you after a few seconds of peaceful contact.
- Rarely, mobs may behave unpredictably for realism.

Perfect for immersive survival, roleplay, or peaceful-hardcore servers.
